sUSDS._note: decimals=6 so position_amount=5 means 5_000_000 = $5 USDC to spend via PSM

AERO._note: Aerodrome native token — position_amount=2.5 AERO (~$2.50 at ~$1/AERO)

VIRTUAL._note: Virtuals Protocol token on Base — position_amount=7 VIRTUAL (~$5 at ~$0.72/VIRTUAL)

DOLA._note: Inverse Finance DOLA stablecoin on Base

USDz._note: Anzen Finance USDz stablecoin on Base

USDT._note: Bridged USDT on Base — used in Uniswap v3 USDT/WETH and USDT/USDC pools

CAKE._note: PancakeSwap CAKE OFT on Base. price via slot0 CAKE/WETH pool (fee=10000)

MORPHO._note: Morpho Protocol token on Base. price via slot0 Uni3 USDC/MORPHO pool (fee=10000)

cbXRP._note: Coinbase wrapped XRP on Base. price via slot0 Cake3 WETH/cbXRP pool (fee=500)

weETH._note: ether.fi Wrapped ETH on Base. LST priced ~= ETH. position_amount=0.0024 weETH (~$4.9 at $2031/ETH)

spark_susds.name: Spark sUSDS
spark_susds._note: sUSDS on Base has no ERC4626 deposit — buy via PSM3 USDC->sUSDS, hold, sell via PSM3

platforms._borrow_note: All compound_borrow platforms use new state encoding: 'TOKEN:wei|TOKEN:wei||BASE:borrow_wei'

cb_weth_wsteth.name: Compound WETH Comet - wstETH collateral
cb_weth_wsteth._note: Borrow ETH against staked ETH — correlated pair, price risk cancels out. LiqCF=93%

cb_aero_weth.name: Compound AERO Comet - WETH collateral
cb_aero_weth._note: AERO is volatile — lower LTV 10-20%, shorter expiry 3-5d. Need AERO to 3x+ to liquidate at 20% LTV

platforms._mw_borrow_note: Moonwell (Compound v2 fork) — enterMarkets + borrow/repayBorrow. Comptroller: 0xfBb21d0380beE3312B33c4353c8936a0F13EF26C

mw_wsteth_weth.name: Moonwell wstETH -> WETH
mw_wsteth_weth._note: LST->ETH borrow — correlated pair, price risk minimal

mw_weth_morpho.name: Moonwell WETH -> MORPHO
mw_weth_morpho._note: MORPHO util=3.6% — very easy to borrow; route via Uni3 fee=10000

mw_weth_cbxrp.name: Moonwell WETH -> cbXRP
mw_weth_cbxrp._note: cbXRP util=32% — safe; route via Cake3 fee=500

mw_weth_virtual.name: Moonwell WETH -> VIRTUAL (fallback USDC)
mw_weth_virtual._note: VIRTUAL util=92.1% — if >95% falls back to borrow USDC instead
